findings.message: New redis-exporter service added (port 9121) but no corresponding Prometheus scrape job configured in prometheus.yml. Metrics from this exporter will not be collected.
findings.suggestion: Add a scrape job for redis in infra/observability/prometheus/prometheus.yml: job_name: redis with static_configs targeting redis-exporter:9121
